title: FRTrustSystem
description:
The /trust and /friend system, designed to protect your server from griefers and warn about interactions with blocks and containers.

(friends and trusted)
body:
# FRTrustSystem 
It is a powerful Minecraft plugin that introduces a **trust** and **friendship system** to protect players' property. With simple commands, players can _trust others to access their blocks and storage_, send _friend requests_, and _receive notifications_ about suspicious activities. FRTS integrates with **CoreProtect** for block ownership tracking and supports _multilingual functionality_ (English, Russian, Ukrainian, French).

> The French and Ukrainian localizations could contain mistakes. We’ll fix it soon.

> **CoreProtect** required! Downloald it [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/coreprotect).

##  Key Features
- **Trust System**: Players can add others to their trusted list, allowing them to interact with their blocks (e.g., chests, furnaces) and storage without triggering violation notifications.
- **Friendship System**: Ability to send and accept friend requests, automatically adding friends to the trusted list.
- **Notifications and Protection**: The plugin notifies owners and moderators if someone attempts to break a block or take items from storage without permission.
- **CoreProtect Integration**: Utilizes the CoreProtect API to determine block owners, ensuring accurate protection.
- **Flexible Configuration**: Customizable settings in config.yml, such as block break checks, inventory take checks, owner and moderator notifications, and notification distance.
- **User-Friendly**: Easy-to-use commands like /trust, /friend, /friends, /trusted, and administrative commands such as /frtrust reload for reloading the configuration.

### Griefer's view
![Griefer's view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0faf8039624952ad019d4501d326328f8bd177ec.png)
### Owner's view
![Owner's view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2294433312e9539690c7036a8629e9f324ad4a3d.png)
### Admin's view
![Admin's view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2d3202affe6ff7e2f5cd02b3719d6cd43d6768d.png)

### Requirements:
- **CoreProtect** plugin installed for block ownership tracking.

###  Main Commands:
- **/trust <player>** — Add a player to your trusted list.
- **/untrust <player>** — Remove a player from your trusted list.
- **/friend <player>** — Send a friend request.
- **/unfriend <player>** — Remove a friend.
- **/faccept** — Accept a friend request.
- **/fdeny** — Deny a friend request.
- **/friends** — Display your friends list.
- **/trusted** — Display your trusted players list.
- **/frtrust [help|info|reload|setlanguage]** — Manage the plugin (help, info, reload, language change).
### Permissions:
- **frtrustsystem.notify** — Permission to receive notifications about actions on others' blocks and storage (default for operators).
- **frtrustsystem.reload** — Permission to reload the plugin configuration (default for operators).

### Benefits:
- Enhanced property protection without relying on complex systems like WorldGuard and others.
- Social integration through trust and friendship mechanics.
- Colorful, clickable notifications with teleportation support.
- Easy setup and use, suitable for both beginners and experienced server admins.

### Links
- Discord: [link](https://discord.gg/mpfnQWjwuy)
- Mail: frsdevmc@gmail.com
